title: Frontend Design and Testing Skill Gaps

workflow_patterns.title: Plan Mode for Project Scaffolding
workflow_patterns.description: User requests a feature, agent enters plan mode, explores the directory, launches a Plan sub-agent, writes a detailed implementation plan, and exits for user approval before coding.

workflow_patterns.title: Parallel Multi-File Creation
workflow_patterns.description: Agent creates multiple CSS and JS files in parallel batches, following a predefined directory layout from the plan. Design token architecture with variables.css referenced across all style files.

workflow_patterns.title: Screenshot-Feedback-Fix Cycle
workflow_patterns.description: Agent deploys site locally, takes Playwright screenshot, user reviews and reports issues (wrong images, broken modal), agent fixes and re-screenshots to verify.

workflow_patterns.title: Asset Discovery via Sub-Agent Research
workflow_patterns.description: Agent delegates image URL research to a general-purpose sub-agent performing web searches, then integrates results back into source files via targeted edits.

evolutions.description: Build polished frontend interfaces with dark themes, animations, and responsive CSS grid layouts.

edits.new_string: ## CSS Architecture for Static Sites When building static HTML/CSS/JS sites, split styles into five concern-based files: 1. **variables.css** — All design tokens: colors, spacing, typography, shadows as CSS custom properties 2. **base.css** — Reset, body defaults, custom scrollbar, smooth scroll 3. **layout.css** — Header, grid container (`repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr))`), footer, responsive breakpoints 4. **components.css** — Cards, modals, search inputs, filter pills, badges 5. **animations.css** — Keyframes (fadeInUp, shimmer), hover transitions, modal entrance Never hardcode colors, fonts, or spacing outside `variables.css`. Every value references a custom property. ### Image Strategy Use curated image URLs from Unsplash CDN rather than random placeholder services: - Format: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-{id}?w=800&h=600&fit=crop` - Each image should be thematically relevant to its content - Add `loading="lazy"` to all `` elements - Include a CSS shimmer placeholder animation while images load ### Interactive Element Checklist Before declaring a static site complete, verify: - [ ] Modal close: X button, overlay click, and Escape key all work - [ ] Search: debounced input filters content correctly - [ ] Filter pills: clicking toggles active state and filters cards - [ ] Focus trapping in modal (Tab cycles within modal when open) - [ ] `aria-live` region on dynamic content containers

evolutions.rationale:
Frontend-design skill lacks static site CSS architecture guidance.
- Missing design token file-splitting patterns
- No pre-deployment checklist for interactive elements (modal close bug would have been caught)

evolutions.description: Automated Playwright testing with screenshot comparison for web application visual verification.

edits.new_string:
## Visual Review Workflow for Static Sites

When verifying a static site during development, follow this structured review loop:

### Quick Deploy
```bash
python3 -m http.server 8080 &
```

### Capture Script Template
```python
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900})
    page.goto('http://localhost:8080', wait_until='networkidle')
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)  # Let images and animations settle
    page.screenshot(path='/tmp/site-review.png', full_page=True)
    browser.close()
```

### Console Error Check
Before taking the screenshot, attach a console listener to catch JavaScript errors:
```python
errors = []
page.on('console', lambda msg: errors.append(msg.text) if msg.type == 'error' else None)
```
Report any captured errors to the user alongside the screenshot.

### Multi-Viewport Verification
Capture at three standard widths to verify responsive behavior:
- Desktop: 1440x900
- Tablet: 768x1024
- Mobile: 375x812

### Interaction Smoke Tests
After visual review, run quick interaction checks:
```python
# Test modal open/close
page.click('.card:first-child')
assert page.is_visible('.modal')
page.keyboard.press('Escape')
assert not page.is_visible('.modal')

# Test search filtering
page.fill('.search', 'pancake')
assert page.locator('.card:visible').count() >= 1
```

evolutions.rationale:
Webapp-testing skill lacks structured visual review workflow.
- Needs reusable Playwright screenshot template with console error capture
- Missing interaction smoke tests that would catch modal close bugs pre-review

summary:
Two installed skills need targeted improvements based on static site workflow.
- Frontend-design lacks CSS architecture patterns and an interactive element checklist
- Webapp-testing needs structured Playwright templates and interaction smoke tests
- Both gaps caused real friction: broken modal close and manual screenshot iteration
user_profile:
Frontend developer building polished static websites.
- Uses plan mode for scoping and iterates through visual screenshots
- Hits UI interaction bugs that systematic testing could prevent
